hero.headline: Rock Hill's *concrete crew* — built different
hero.subheadline: We walk you through every pour from start to finish. No surprises, no shortcuts.

services.title: Foundation Pours
services.description: Residential and commercial foundations built right the first time. We handle excavation to final grade.

services.title: Driveways & Walkways
services.description: Smooth concrete surfaces that last. Proper base prep and reinforcement on every job.

services.title: Patio & Outdoor Spaces
services.description: Custom concrete work for outdoor living. Stamped, stained, or traditional finishes available.

services.title: Commercial Concrete
services.description: Large-scale pours for commercial projects. Industrial-grade materials and equipment.

about.heading: Built on experience
about.body: We're a Rock Hill concrete team with generations of experience. Real crews, real equipment, real results.

reviews.name: Jason F.
reviews.text: Bryan and his crew are excellent. They guided us through every step of construction from beginning to end. Highly recommend Morgan Construction for your project.

reviews.name: Trey M.
reviews.text: Outstanding construction company with decades of experience. My family can tackle any building project you're planning.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we pour
service_areas.subheading: Serving the greater Rock Hill area

cta.heading: Ready to break ground?
cta.body: Get a straight quote on your concrete project. We'll walk you through the process from start to finish.
